positive: A stylized, geometric portrait of a majestic owl perched on a winding branch, rendered in a bold, single-color linework style with negative space accents. The owl's feathers are depicted using angular, repeating patterns (mandala-like geometry), and the background features minimalist constellations and branching forest silhouettes. The composition is centered and symmetrical, optimizing for apparel transfer. Color direction: Deep midnight blue and earthy burnt orange accents, providing high contrast. Lighting: Flat, graphic illustration style with crisp outlines. Print-friendly details: Optimized for repeating print patterns (tileable design aspect) while maintaining a central focal point.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, low resolution, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, messy, realism, photorealistic, 3d render
